description_long: This is a small, squeezable plastic bottle filled with a reddish-brown liquid, likely a condiment or beverage enhancer. The bottle features a ribbed, contoured body for grip and a black screw cap on top. The front label is predominantly black with red, white, and green accents, displaying the brand 'Michelada Mix El Cejas' along with a stylized illustration of a man's face. The label wraps around the bottle, with nutritional information and additional branding visible on the sides and back. The plastic is slightly translucent, allowing the color of the contents to show through. The bottle appears clean, undamaged, and is designed for single-hand use, typical for personal consumable products.
description: A small, ribbed plastic bottle with a black screw cap, filled with reddish-brown liquid and wrapped in a colorful branded label.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main label with 'Michelada Mix El Cejas' branding and a stylized face illustration.
description_view_1: Angled rear-left view revealing the label's side text and partial back, with less branding visible.
description_view_2: Direct back view displaying the rear label with product information and a graphic hand holding a bottle.
description_view_3: Angled rear-right view showing the nutrition facts panel and more of the label's side details.
attribute_label_or_branding: Front label features 'Michelada Mix El Cejas' in bold white and red text, a stylized illustration of a man's face, and additional branding elements in red, white, and green. Side and back labels include nutritional facts, product information, and a graphic of a hand holding a bottle.
